calendar.matters:
Plaintiff Asha Mansinghka'S 1.) Petition For Reinstateement Of Reinstatement Of Malicious Prosecution Action Off Calendared 9/16/1996, 2.) Unsealing Remittitur Issued In A080555 On January 2000, 3.) Termination Of Jcc3216 Legal Representation Dispute Cases Under Rule 1545, California Rules Of Court, Title Five, Special Rules For Trial Courts, 4.) Request For Casefile To Be Retained By The Court Clerk For Final Disposition Of Malicious Prosecution Action
Off Calendar Sep-24-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Asha Mansinghka, 510-797-4362 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Plaintiff provides doscumentation to the Court. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff Asha Mansinghka'S 1.) Petition For Reinstateement Of Reinstatement Of Malicious Prosecution Action Off Calendared 9/16/1996, 2.) Unsealing Remittitur Issued In A080555 On January 2000, 3.) Termination Of Jcc3216 Legal Representation Dispute Cases Under Rule 1545, California Rules Of Court, Title Five, Special Rules For Trial Courts, 4.) Request For Casefile To Be Retained By The Court Clerk For Final Disposition Of Malicious Prosecution Action.

Plaintiff's Petition is Denied. The matter is dismissed pursuant to the 5 year statute. Petitioner may file an Appeal. The Court will prepare an order.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

Petition For Reinstatement Of Malicious Prosecution Action Off Calendared 9/16/1996, Unsealing Remittitur Issued In A080555 On January 2000, Termination Of Jcc3216 Legal Reprsentation Dispute Cases Under Rule 1545, California Rules Of Court, Title Five, Special Rules For Trial Courts, Request For Casefile To Be Retained By The Court Clerk For Final Disposition Of Malicious Prosecution Action
Off Calendar Sep-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Asha Mansinghka, Plaintiff/Self-Represented Litigant, 510.797.4362, appearing in pro per;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

PLAINTIFF ASHA MANSINGHKA'S 1.) PETITION FOR REINSTATEEMENT OF REINSTATEMENT OF MALICIOUS PROSECUTION ACTION OFF CALENDARED 9/16/1996, 2.) UNSEALING REMITTITUR ISSUED IN A080555 ON JANUARY 2000, 3.) TERMINATION OF JCC3216 LEGAL REPRESENTATION DISPUTE CASES UNDER RULE 1545, CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, TITLE FIVE, SPECIAL RULES FOR TRIAL COURTS, 4.) REQUEST FOR CASEFILE TO BE RETAINED BY THE COURT CLERK FOR FINAL DISPOSITION OF MALICIOUS PROSECUTION ACTION.

Matter called. Ms. Mansinghka presented the Court with a copy of an endorsed filed proof of service dated Aug. 14, 1995. The Court asked Ms. Mansinghka if she notice had given to the Boccardo Law Firm with regard to her appearance today. Ms. Mansinghka stated that she did not give notice. Discussions held.

At the conclusion of discussions, the Court continued the matter to September 24, 2018 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. The Court will give notice and will send a copy of the proof of service dated Aug. 14, 1995 presented in court today to the Boccardo Law Firm.

Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/ACM)
